title: Add Panel Logic Unit Tests with Jest+jsdom
description: Create Jest+jsdom unit tests for panel UI logic following TESTING_GUIDE.md patterns. Mock Editor.Panel, Editor.Ipc, and Editor.Dialog APIs. Test user interactions, state management, button handlers, and IPC communication. Reference ccc-smart-component-manager patterns for modern test structure.

criteria: 20+ test cases covering: state management, button handlers, IPC communication, error handling
All tests pass: npm test -- panel (exit code 0)
Editor.Panel and Editor.Ipc mocks implemented correctly
convergence.definition_of_done: Panel logic has comprehensive unit test coverage with proper Editor API mocks

files.change: New test file for panel UI logic (20+ test cases)
Mock module for Editor.Panel, Editor.Ipc, Editor.Dialog APIs

implementation.title: Create Editor API mocks
implementation.description: Create mock module for Cocos Creator Editor APIs: Editor.Panel, Editor.Ipc, Editor.Dialog
modification_points: Mock Editor.Panel.extend() to capture panel definition
Mock Editor.Ipc.sendToMain() and sendToPanel() with jest.fn()
logic_flow: Add Panel.extend mock that stores config
Add Ipc mocks with call tracking
Add Dialog mock with result simulation
Export mock for use in tests

implementation.title: Create panel test file structure

risks: Panel uses Editor.Panel.extend() which is hard to test - mitigate by capturing extend config and testing handlers directly
